violations.text: The walls of the walk-in cooler were observed to have an accumulation of a dust, residue, or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

The sealed coating of the floor in the walk-in cooler was observed to be worn and in need of resealing. The physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the coffee counter syrup bottle pumps were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Soap was not available at the new hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
The new hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

At the time of inspection, the new hand sink installed near the 3 bay sink area was observed to be lacking cold water supply. Water under pressure shall be provided to all fixtures, EQUIPMENT, and non-FOOD EQUIPMENT that are required to use water. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

The condensate from the Coca Cola Soda Dispensing unit is draining into the 3 bay sink. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024

The establishment is lacking a hand-washing sink for use at the 3 Bay Sink area. A hand sink is to be installed for use at the e 3 bay sink for washing hands after cleaning and sanitizing coffee equipment. Sale of coffee is to be discontinued until hand sink is installed. Sink on hand in the store at the time of inspection. Per the PIC, sink is to be installed later same day as inspection (picture to be sent to inspector). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

Per interview of the staff, staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them with cleaning tablets (Tablets are for cleaning only, not for sanitizing). After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. (Store observed to have Bleach on shelf at the time of inspection for use of sanitizing coffee equipment.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

Several food items in the retail reach-in cooler were observed held at 41 to 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items moved to colder zone of refrigeration at the time of inspection. Food items observed at 45 degrees Fahrenheit or above were voluntarily disposed of, food items observed at 44 degrees Fahrenheit or below were moved to colder area of refrigeration at he time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

At the time of inspection, the retail reach-in cooler in the sales area was observed to be in need of adjustment/repair. The reach-in retail cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 43 degrees Fahrenheit at the time of inspection with food temperatures being maintained at 41 to 44 degrees Fahrenheit from top to bottom. Equipment is to be adjusted to properly maintain food temperatures at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Unit was adjusted by the PIC at the time of inspection. Unit observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 37 degrees Fahrenheit by end of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in shelving covers were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The condensate from the Coca Cola Soda Dispensing unit is draining into the 3 bay sink. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The ceiling in the walk-in cooler was observed to have an accumulation of soil residue, dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The establishment is lacking a hand-washing sink for use at the 3 Bay Sink area. A hand sink is to be installed for use at the e 3 bay sink for washing hands after cleaning and sanitizing coffee equipment. Sale of coffee is to be discontinued until hand sink is installed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

Per interview of the staff, staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them with cleaning tablets. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

Several food items in the retail reach-in cooler were observed held at 41 to 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items moved to colder zone of refrigeration at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

At the time of inspection, the retail reach-in cooler in the sales area was observed to be in need of adjustment/repair. The reach-in retail cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 43 degrees Fahrenheit at the time of inspection with food temperatures being maintained at 41 to 44 degrees Fahrenheit from top to bottom. Equipment is to be adjusted to properly maintain food temperatures at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in shelving covers were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The condensate from the Coca Cola Soda Dispensing unit is draining into the 3 bay sink. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The ceiling in the walk-in cooler was observed to have an accumulation of soil residue, dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
